description: Representative WLD-bucket audit for the Stage 21 WLD-only stability-cutoff prototype, using a small exact-reference 14-empty set plus one heavy 18-empty black-to-move spot-check.
notes: The Stage 21 prototype only runs inside the dedicated WLD bucket; exact-endgame search remains untouched.
The candidate threshold was kept conservative at 6 empties before small-solver handoff.
This benchmark is intentionally smaller than the Stage 19 holdout because the local execution environment enforces a short per-run wall-clock limit.
